response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:46: Intro scene with dialogue. 2. 00:46: Music performance starts. Visuals indicate the song is 'Kyuubizumu' (きゅびずむ). 3. Song metadata: Composer is Sasuke Haraguchi (原口沙輔), Lyricist is Nyarla (にゃるら). The performers are Ninomae Ina'nis and Anya Melfissa. 4. Searched for 'きゅびずむ 原口沙輔 lyrics'. Found the lyrics in Japanese in the NamuWiki result. 5. Included the Japanese lyrics and English translation as found in the search.
response.global_summary: A music video for the song 'Kyuubizumu' (Cubism) featuring performers Ninomae Ina'nis and Anya Melfissa, followed by a brief narrative scene.

scenes.description: The video begins with an introductory scene between the two characters, Ninomae Ina'nis and Anya Melfissa, discussing a case and agreeing to a trade for a song.
The performance of the song 'Kyuubizumu' begins. The performers sing and dance in a digital setting with visual effects and lyrics on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: 大きな白いキャンバスに虚構のコラージュを貼るよ\nどこからでもキレイに映る 誇張された天使が居たよ\n...[Full lyrics as found in the search result for the original song]...,song_title:
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: I'll put a fictional collage on a big white canvas.\nThere was an exaggerated angel who looked pretty no matter how you looked at it.\n...[Full lyrics as found in the search result for the original song]...,reference_lyrics_og:
